title.zh: 脾胃不好怎么办？中医调理脾胃全攻略
title.en: Spleen-Stomach Issues? Complete TCM Regulation Guide

description.zh: 详细介绍脾胃虚弱的表现、原因和调理方法，包括饮食、穴位和生活习惯
description.en: Detailed guide to spleen-stomach weakness - manifestations, causes, and conditioning methods

zh.text: 脾胃是人体消化吸收的重要器官，中医称脾胃为"后天之本"。脾胃功能好坏直接影响营养吸收和整体健康。了解如何调理脾胃，是养生保健的重要内容。

items: 食欲不振，不想吃饭
腹胀腹痛，消化不良
大便稀溏或便秘
面色萎黄，精神不振
四肢乏力，容易疲劳
口淡无味，舌苔厚腻
体重下降或虚胖
饮食不规律：暴饮暴食，饥饱无度
饮食不健康：过多生冷、油腻、辛辣
过度劳累：长期疲劳损伤脾胃
情志失调：忧思过度伤脾
久病耗损：慢性疾病损伤脾胃
先天不足：体质虚弱
山药：补脾益肺，固肾益精
薏米：健脾利湿，清热排脓
红枣：补气养血，健脾和胃
小米：健脾和胃，安神助眠
南瓜：补中益气，健脾养胃
莲子：补脾止泻，养心安神

zh.text: 位置：小腿外侧，膝盖下3寸。
位置：背部，第11胸椎棘突下旁开1.5寸。
位置：背部，第12胸椎棘突下旁开1.5寸。

zh.title: 山药薏米粥
zh.instructions:
1. 山药去皮切块
2. 薏米提前浸泡
3. 大米洗净加水煮粥
4. 加入山药、薏米、红枣
5. 煮至粘稠
6. 每日食用，健脾养胃

items: 规律饮食：定时定量，三餐规律
细嚼慢咽：充分咀嚼，减轻脾胃负担
避免生冷：少吃生冷食物，保护脾胃阳气
适度运动：促进消化，增强脾胃功能
情绪调节：避免忧思过度，保持心情舒畅
充足睡眠：保证休息，让脾胃得到恢复

zh.text: 温馨提示：脾胃调理需要循序渐进，不可急于求成。严重脾胃问题如胃溃疡、胃炎等应在医师指导下治疗。

en.text: Spleen and stomach are key digestive organs. TCM calls them 'foundation of postnatal life'. Their function directly affects nutrient absorption and overall health. Understanding spleen-stomach regulation is essential for wellness.

items: Poor appetite, reluctance to eat
Bloating, abdominal pain, indigestion
Loose stool or constipation
Sallow complexion, low energy
Weak limbs, easy fatigue
Tasteless mouth, thick greasy tongue coating
Weight loss or puffiness
Irregular eating: Binge eating, irregular meals
Unhealthy diet: Excessive raw-cold, greasy, spicy foods
Overexertion: Long-term fatigue damages spleen-stomach
Emotional imbalance: Excessive worry damages spleen
Chronic illness: Diseases consume spleen-stomach
Congenital deficiency: Weak constitution
Yam: Tonify spleen-lung, secure kidney essence
Coix seed: Strengthen spleen, resolve dampness
Red dates: Tonify Qi-Blood, harmonize spleen-stomach
Millet: Strengthen spleen-stomach, calm spirit
Pumpkin: Tonify middle Qi, strengthen spleen-stomach
Lotus seed: Tonify spleen, stop diarrhea, calm spirit

en.text: Point 1: Zusanli (ST36) - Strengthen spleen, harmonize stomach
Location: Outer lower leg, 3 cun below knee.
Point 3: Pishu (BL20) - Strengthen spleen, tonify Qi
Location: Back, 1.5 cun lateral to 11th thoracic vertebra.
Point 4: Weishu (BL21) - Harmonize stomach, relieve pain
Location: Back, 1.5 cun lateral to 12th thoracic vertebra.

en.title: Yam Coix Porridge
en.instructions:
1. Peel yam, cut into chunks
2. Soak coix seed beforehand
3. Wash rice, add water for porridge
4. Add yam, coix, dates
5. Cook until thick
6. Eat daily to strengthen spleen-stomach

items: Regular eating: Fixed times and amounts, regular three meals
Chew thoroughly: Reduce spleen-stomach burden
Avoid raw-cold: Protect spleen-stomach Yang
Moderate exercise: Promote digestion, strengthen function
Emotional balance: Avoid excessive worry, stay cheerful
Sufficient sleep: Ensure rest for spleen-stomach recovery

en.text: Note: Spleen-stomach regulation needs gradual progress. Serious issues like ulcers, gastritis should be treated under physician guidance.
